mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.nickname AS applicant_name, d.dept_name AS dept_name FROM asset_application a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.applicant_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON a.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 'PENDING' AND a.dept_id IN ( SELECT dept_id FROM sys_dept WHERE FIND_IN_SET(#{auditorDeptId}, ancestors) OR dept_id = #{auditorDeptId} ) ORDER BY a.create_time ASC

SELECT a.*, u.nickname AS applicant_name, d.dept_name AS dept_name, au.nickname AS approver_name FROM asset_application a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.applicant_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON a.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user au ON a.approver_id = au.user_id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0
